since_last: 57% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +4.93%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.09% · BTC +2.65% · Gold +1.20% · Nasdaq100 -1.34%. 57% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +4.93%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +4.93%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.84%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at -12.39%
cards.body: Leaders: APP +10.61%, CRWD +10.01%, META +9.45%, PLTR +8.61%, SNAP +8.22%. Laggards: KLAC -12.39%, TER -11.03%, LRCX -10.90%, AMAT -10.05%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -8.21% at $156.83
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -8.21% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
